summary: Implements issue_create as the 6th apply-mode operation, completing the full autonomous 6-operation loop: issue_create → pr_open → ci_wait → merge → issue_close → post_merge_memory. issue_create uses create-or-verify semantics: searches for an existing GitHub issue by title; if found returns verified_existing; if not calls gh issue create. Pilot scope guard expanded to include all 6 operations. command_boundary updated. apply-unsupported-op test assertion updated to match the new boundary string. apply-mode run artifact persistence fix carried from issue-140 merge. All local validators and CLI tests pass. Full 6-operation apply-mode loop will execute on issue 142.
policy_result: Compliant. Script changes limited to the apply-mode execution block and the apply-unsupported-op test assertion. No secrets, production, billing, auth, database, CI/CD security, or deployment changes.
risk_result: Medium risk (script behavior change). issue_create calls gh issue create when no matching issue exists. create-or-verify semantics prevent duplicate issues. All operations gated behind apply_allowed and pilot scope guard.
unresolved_risks: GitHub CI and PR merge pending for issue 142 branch.
issue_create searches by exact title match. If issue title contains special characters, gh search may return partial results.
Full 6-operation apply-mode loop is first live end-to-end run with ci_wait and post_merge_memory combined.
merge_status: apply-mode run pending: will open PR, wait for CI via ci_wait, merge, close issue, and create closure branch via post_merge_memory.
